Profile operations: show the active profile, switch to a different one,
list profiles with memory counts, or read/set a profile's TTL.

The active profile is persisted in ~/.ogham/active_profile (a single-line
sentinel file). config.toml's default_profile is the baseline that applies
when no sentinel is present; it is never mutated by 'profile switch'.

Precedence (highest first): OGHAM_PROFILE env var, ~/.ogham/active_profile,
config.toml default_profile, the literal "default".

Usage:
  ogham profile [command]

Available Commands:
  current     Show the active profile
  list        List profiles with memory counts
  switch      Switch the active profile (sentinel-file, TOML stays untouched)
  ttl         Read or set a profile's TTL in days (omit days to read)

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for profile

Global Flags:
      --legacy          Route through the Python MCP sidecar instead of native Go
      --python          Alias for --legacy
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)

Use "ogham profile [command] --help" for more information about a command.
